summary: Iteration 54: Tested all P1 features - Genre dropdown (Pop/Alternative), Trending in Collections (replaced Fresh Pressings), Admin User Management. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 13 frontend verifications passed (100%).
passed_tests: 1. Genre dropdown in Settings includes Pop after R&B - VERIFIED via Playwright (index 5 after R&B at index 4)
2. Genre dropdown in Settings includes Alternative after Indie - VERIFIED via Playwright (index 9 after Indie at index 8)
3. GET /api/explore/trending-in-collections returns array of records - VERIFIED via pytest
4. Records contain discogs_id, artist, title, have, cover_url fields - VERIFIED via pytest
5. GET /api/explore/trending-in-collections caches results (24h TTL) - VERIFIED via pytest
6. Old /api/explore/fresh-pressings endpoint returns 404 - VERIFIED via pytest
7. GET /api/admin/users returns list with id, username, email, is_admin, created_at - VERIFIED via pytest
8. GET /api/admin/users?role_filter=admin returns only admins - VERIFIED via pytest
9. GET /api/admin/users?search=demo returns filtered results - VERIFIED via pytest
10. POST /api/admin/users/role cannot revoke own admin (returns 400) - VERIFIED via pytest
11. Admin User Management tab has search bar, filter pills (All/Admin/Standard), user table - VERIFIED via Playwright screenshot
12. Make Admin button opens confirmation modal with 'Grant Admin Access?' title - VERIFIED via Playwright screenshot
13. Confirmation modal Cancel button is amber, Confirm button is outlined - VERIFIED via Playwright screenshot
14. Explore page shows 'Trending in Collections' section with album art, artist, title - VERIFIED via screenshot
15. 'owned by X collectors' stat displayed under each record - VERIFIED via screenshot
16. See All link navigates to /explore/trending-in-collections - VERIFIED via Playwright
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsPage.js Line 297: Genre array correctly ordered - ['Jazz', 'Soul', 'Funk', 'R&B', 'Pop', 'Hip Hop', 'Rock', 'Indie', 'Alternative', ...]
explore.py Lines 303-364: trending-in-collections endpoint uses MongoDB 'cache' collection with 24h TTL, calls Discogs API with sort=have&sort_order=desc&format=vinyl
admin.py Lines 408-436: GET /admin/users supports search and role_filter (all/admin/standard) params
admin.py Lines 444-456: POST /admin/users/role correctly prevents self-revoke with 400 error
AdminPage.js Lines 1039-1191: UserManagementSection has search, filter pills, user table, role confirmation modal
ExplorePage.js Lines 199-222: Trending in Collections section shows album art, title, artist, have count with 'owned by X collectors' text

test_credentials.note: Demo account is admin. Used for testing admin endpoints.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54: All P1 features verified. 1) Settings genre dropdown correctly includes Pop (after R&B) and Alternative (after Indie) in the genre array at SettingsPage.js Line 297. 2) Trending in Collections endpoint (/explore/trending-in-collections) uses Discogs API with sort=have to get most-collected vinyl, caches in MongoDB for 24h. Returns array with discogs_id, artist, title, have (collector count), cover_url. 3) Old Fresh Pressings endpoint removed (returns 404). 4) Admin User Management at /admin?section=users has search, role filters (all/admin/standard), user table with Make Admin/Revoke Admin buttons. 5) Role change confirmation modal has amber Cancel button, outlined Confirm button. 6) Self-revoke prevented with 400 error. 7) Explore page shows 'owned by X collectors' stat under each Trending in Collections record.
